fiction.title: YESTERYEAR
fiction.author: Caro Claire Burke
fiction.description: Natalie Heller Mills, a privileged tradwife social media influencer, wakes up to find she is living in the comparatively difficult reality of 1855.

fiction.title: PHOEBE BERMAN'S GONNA LOSE IT
fiction.author: Brooke Averick
fiction.description: As her 30th birthday approaches, Phoebe Berman goes from no dating life to juggling several prospects.

fiction.title: THE FINAL TARGET
fiction.author: Nora Roberts
fiction.description: A fan fixates on the introverted author Arden Bowie, who tries to set up a new life for herself in a small town in Oregon.

fiction.title: THE MIDNIGHT TRAIN
fiction.author: Matt Haig
fiction.description: The second book in the Midnight World series. Wilbur wants to go back in time to see how he might have lived differently.

fiction.title: THE BALLAD OF FALLING DRAGONS
fiction.author: Sarah A. Parker
fiction.description: The second book in the Moonfall series. As a calamitous moonfall approaches, Raeve must make life-or-death decisions.

nonfiction.title: THE LAND AND ITS PEOPLE
nonfiction.author: David Sedaris
nonfiction.description: Essays on the passage of time, complicated relationships and some unexpected delights life has to offer.

nonfiction.title: STRANGERS
nonfiction.author: Belle Burden
nonfiction.description: Burden retraces her marriage of 20 years in search of clues to help shape her understanding about its demise and to find a way forward.

nonfiction.title: THE HERO NEXT DOOR
nonfiction.author: Martha Raddatz
nonfiction.description: The Emmy Award–winning ABC News anchor profiles members of our military who served in the wake of 9/11.

nonfiction.title: CRISIS OF THE COMMON GOOD
nonfiction.author: Chris Murphy
nonfiction.description: The Democratic senator from Connecticut re-examines one of our country’s organizing principles.

nonfiction.title: ALL WE SAY
nonfiction.author: Ben Rhodes
nonfiction.description: The former speechwriter for President Obama explicates what it means to be American through this collection of 15 speeches.
